stemHtml: Complete the following statements with respect to wing planform and initial stall sequence. The initial stall tendency is that a rectangular wing (1) _____, an elliptical wing (2) _____, a moderately tapered wing (3) _____, and a swept wing with high taper (4) _____.

options.a: (1) stalls first at the wing tip; (2) stalls evenly along the wing; (3) stalls first at the mid-section; (4) stalls first at the wing root
options.b: (1) stalls first at the wing root; (2) stalls first at the wing root; (3) stalls first at the wing tip; (4) stalls evenly along the wing
options.c: (1) stalls first at the wing tip; (2) stalls evenly along the wing; (3) stalls first at the wing tip; (4) stalls first at the wing tip
options.d: (1) stalls first at the wing root; (2) stalls evenly along the wing; (3) stalls first at the mid-section; (4) stalls first at the wing tip
